pet_notes: Use the provided full-body knight exactly as the character identity: horned helmet, black steel armor, gold trim, blue torn cape, long silver sword, retro 2D fantasy sprite.
style_notes: 2D game sprite, clean readable silhouette, transparent final sprites, consistent proportions across all animation rows.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `pixel`: Pixel-art-adjacent digital mascot with a chunky silhouette, simple dark outline, limited palette, flat cel shading, and visible stepped edges. User style notes: 2D game sprite, clean readable silhouette, transparent final sprites, consistent proportions across all animation rows..
